name: Five Years Old Memories
short_description: This is an interactive omnibus animation based on interviews with my friends about their memories around the age of five, based on their personal sensory memories and episodes.
detailed_description:
This is an interactive omnibus animation based on interviews with my friends about their memories around the age of five, based on their personal sensory memories and episodes. Let's relive their memories together as we find out how to do it.

Language: 日本語/English(subtitle only)

Playtime: 15~20 minutes

Features

・Some episodes proceeds by operating at certain points during the story.

・Try and find the interactions for each episode.

・Simple hand-drawn animation captures the imagination.

Credits

Interview, Animation, Design - Komitsu

Engineer - Shoto Hayakawa

Music - Natsumi Nogawa

Created as part of the Artists-in-Residence Online program organized by NTT InterCommunication Center [ICC].

About Streaming

welcome!! Please include the title and the URL of this page in the description section of the video.

Exhibition

・ICC Annual 2023: Shapes of Things - NTT InterCommunication Center [ICC]

・PARALLAX VOID theca 2023ss exhibition - コ本や honkbooks

・GEIDAI GAMES 05 Game Course Exhibition - Tokyo University of Arts

・Hiroshima Animation Season 2024 [GEIDAI GAMES]

・Tokyo Midtown Design Hub 111th Exhibition "Where the First Breeze of Design Touches"
